candidate.completion: introduce me to your group chat; i miss being ignored by multiple people at once.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please introduce me to your group chat; i miss being ignored by multiple people at once.

evaluation.rationale: A clean turn: loneliness expands into wanting neglect at scale, and the group-chat image sharpens the joke. The pivot is exact and recognizably true, but the sentence is slightly long and more sharp than elegant.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
